headline: From Oil Shock To Earnings Pop

headline: Host Hotels & Resorts: Limited Upside At Current Levels (Rating Downgrade)
summary: Host Hotels & Resorts faces diminishing returns from asset recycling and portfolio renovations. Click here to read why HST stock is downgraded to Hold.
